name: e2e-v2-foreach-overflow
description: Block v2 foreach expansion when extracted source items exceed maxItems.

stages.prompt: Reply exactly {"claims":["E2E_V2_OVERFLOW_A","E2E_V2_OVERFLOW_B"]} and do not inspect or modify files.

each.prompt: Reply exactly ${item}_SHOULD_NOT_RUN and do not inspect or modify files.
